input_messages.content: {"suggestions": ["Deploy a pre-configured Snort IPS inline on the network path between the compromised host's subnet and the rest of the network to automatically detect and block scanning traffic.", "Implement network segmentation by configuring access control lists (ACLs) on the routers (R1 and R2) to restrict traffic from the 192.168.2.0/24 subnet to only authorized services and subnets, thereby preventing lateral movement.", "Configure the FortiGate firewall to enforce strict inter-zone policies, blocking all traffic from the Ubuntu host's subnet to other internal subnets except for necessary business services."], "chosen_mitigation": "Implement network segmentation by configuring access control lists (ACLs) on the routers (R1 and R2) to restrict traffic from the 192.168.2.0/24 subnet to only authorized services and subnets, thereby preventing lateral movement.", "no_mitigation_left": false, "current_mitigations_counter": 1, "reached_mitigation_limit": false}

response.content: {"suggestions": ["Deploy a pre-configured Snort IPS inline on the network path between the compromised host's subnet and the rest of the network to automatically detect and block scanning traffic.", "Implement network segmentation by configuring access control lists (ACLs) on the routers (R1 and R2) to restrict traffic from the 192.168.2.0/24 subnet to only authorized services and subnets, thereby preventing lateral movement.", "Configure the FortiGate firewall to enforce strict inter-zone policies, blocking all traffic from the Ubuntu host's subnet to other internal subnets except for necessary business services."], "chosen_mitigation": "Implement network segmentation by configuring access control lists (ACLs) on the routers (R1 and R2) to restrict traffic from the 192.168.2.0/24 subnet to only authorized services and subnets, thereby preventing lateral movement.", "no_mitigation_left": false, "current_mitigations_counter": 1, "reached_mitigation_limit": false}
